top_findings.summary: The skill requests broad system access (Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash) that is disproportionate to its stated purpose of automated return authorization. While some file access might be needed for configuration or logs, these permissions allow unrestricted filesystem navigation and arbitrary command execution. A return processor should primarily interact with APIs and databases rather than requiring raw filesystem and shell access, which could be exploited to access sensitive business data or system files unrelated to return processing.
